description: A targeted flow for users experiencing back pain, focusing on mattress support and spinal alignment.

headerContent.headline: Wake Up Without Back Pain
headerContent.subheadline: Hey, I’m Ashley — your virtual sleep guide. My job is simple: to help you stay asleep for longer and wake up without back pain, without the sleep fog, and without wondering why you’re tired before the day even starts! If you’re here, I’m guessing that getting a good night’s sleep isn’t proving easy— and trust me, you’re not alone..
headerContent.avatarIntroScript: A lot of people struggle with back pain,  restless nights, sore mornings, and that “why do I feel 20 years older?” stiffness. And while it feels mysterious, it usually isn’t. There’s always a reason.  And there’s almost always a solution!
headerContent.secondarySubheadline: The good news is that I can help. Let’s fix this!
headerContent.audioNotice: For best experience please have your audio turned on

questionContent.questionText: How often do you have trouble falling asleep?

answerOptions.label: Every Night
answerOptions.avatarResponse: I'm sorry to hear that. Having trouble falling asleep every night really takes a toll on your body and mind.

answerOptions.label: Frequently
answerOptions.avatarResponse: You're not alone — many people struggle with falling asleep frequently. Let's figure out what's going on.

answerOptions.label: On Occasion
answerOptions.avatarResponse: That's pretty normal, but we can definitely help you get more consistent, restful sleep.

answerOptions.label: Never
answerOptions.avatarResponse: That's great that falling asleep isn't an issue for you!
answerOptions.terminationMessage: Thanks for taking the sleep test. Based on your responses, unfortunately I don't have enough information to make a recommendation. There could be several reasons why you're not getting a better night's sleep. The best source of information that's freely available is probably Chat GPT or Google.

questionContent.questionText: Which position do you sleep in the most?

answerOptions.label: On My Side
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Side sleeping is great for alignment, but you need the right support to keep your spine neutral.

answerOptions.label: On My Back
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Back sleeping is excellent for spinal alignment when you have proper lumbar support.

answerOptions.label: On My Stomach
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Stomach sleeping can be tough on your back. The right mattress can help minimize the strain on your spine.

answerOptions.label: It Varies
answerOptions.avatarResponse: A combination sleeper! You need a mattress that adapts to all your positions throughout the night.

questionContent.questionText: How often does motion or tossing and turning in bed wake you up or prevent you from falling asleep?

answerOptions.label: Never
answerOptions.avatarResponse: That's great — motion transfer isn't disrupting your sleep.

answerOptions.label: Occasionally
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Some motion disturbance is normal, especially if you share a bed.

answerOptions.label: Regularly
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Regular motion disturbance can seriously impact your sleep quality. That's something we can definitely address.

answerOptions.label: I'm Not Sure
answerOptions.avatarResponse: That's okay — sometimes it's hard to know what's waking you up. We'll factor that in.

questionContent.questionText: How often do you wake with aches and pains?

answerOptions.label: Every Night
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Waking up in pain every day is exhausting. Your mattress should be helping you recover, not causing more problems.

answerOptions.label: Frequently
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Frequent aches and pains are a clear sign your sleep setup needs attention.

answerOptions.label: On Occasion
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Even occasional pain is worth addressing. You deserve to wake up feeling great every day.

answerOptions.label: Never
answerOptions.avatarResponse: That's wonderful that you're not experiencing morning pain!
answerOptions.terminationMessage: Thanks for taking the sleep test. Based on your responses, unfortunately I don't have enough information to make a recommendation. There could be several reasons why you're not getting a better night's sleep. The best source of information that's freely available is probably Chat GPT or Google.

questionContent.questionText: Which of the following is most true for your aches & pains?

answerOptions.label: Spinal surgery, chronic condition, or bad injury
answerOptions.avatarResponse: I understand you're dealing with something more serious. The right mattress support is even more critical for you.

answerOptions.label: Stiffness or Soreness
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Stiffness and soreness are often signs of poor sleep posture or inadequate lumbar support.

answerOptions.label: Hip or Shoulder Discomfort
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Hip and shoulder pain can contribute to back pain since your whole spine is connected. Proper support helps everything.

answerOptions.label: None of the above
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Thanks for letting me know.
answerOptions.terminationMessage: Thanks for taking the sleep test. Based on your responses, unfortunately I don't have enough information to make a recommendation. There could be several reasons why you're not getting a better night's sleep. The best source of information that's freely available is probably Chat GPT or Google.

answerSummaryContent.introText: Based on what you've shared with me,
answerSummaryContent.outroText: Let me show you some mattress options that could really help.
answerSummaryContent.empathyMessage: I completely understand how frustrating sleep issues can be. You deserve to wake up feeling refreshed.
answerSummaryContent.emailCTAMessage: I'd love to send you a personalized sleep report with my recommendations. Can I get your email?

q1-trouble-falling-asleep.every-night: you struggle to fall asleep every night
q1-trouble-falling-asleep.frequently: you frequently have trouble falling asleep
q1-trouble-falling-asleep.on-occasion: you occasionally have trouble falling asleep

q2-sleep-position.varies: you change positions throughout the night

q4-aches-pains-frequency.every-night: you wake up with aches and pains every day
q4-aches-pains-frequency.frequently: you frequently wake up with aches and pains
q4-aches-pains-frequency.on-occasion: you occasionally wake up with aches and pains

q5-aches-pains-type.chronic-condition: you're dealing with a chronic condition
q5-aches-pains-type.hip-shoulder: you have hip or shoulder discomfort

emailCaptureContent.avatarResponseOnSubmit: Perfect! I'll send that right over. Check your inbox for your personalized sleep report.

seeOptionsContent.promptText: I've found three mattress options that are perfect for you based on your responses!
seeOptionsContent.avatarMessage: I've found three mattress options that are perfect for you based on your responses!

storeLocationsContent.ctaBookTitle: Prefer to test the mattress in person?
storeLocationsContent.ctaBookDescription: You can book a sleep-test appointment right away.
storeLocationsContent.ctaContactTitle: Still unsure and want to talk more?
storeLocationsContent.ctaContactDescription: I can connect you with a real human sleep specialist anytime.
